texto: Anyone who calls it "sexual intercourse" can't possibly be interested in actually doing it. You might as well announce you're ready for lunch by proclaiming, "I'd like to do some masticating and enzyme secreting.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Allan Sherman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Anyone who calls it "sexual intercourse" can't possibly be interested in actually doing it. You m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sex, anyone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
